zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley於1401年11月1日出生在英國諾廷加姆爾霍福林加姆時，她的父親Sir Robert Goushill46歲，母親Elizabeth FitzAlan35歲。她於1427年與Thomas Stanley在英國諾廷加姆爾霍福林加姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1459年2月11日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾可諾福斯利享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾布爾斯庫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley于1401年11月1日出生在英国諾廷加姆爾霍福林加姆时，她的父亲Sir Robert Goushill46岁，母亲Elizabeth FitzAlan35岁。她于1427年与Thomas Stanley在英国諾廷加姆爾霍福林加姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1459年2月11日在英国英格兰藍卡爾可諾福斯利享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾布爾斯庫。

nameMeanings.name: Baroness
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: old variant of Barsnes (and, in North America, probably also an altered form of this), a habitational name from a farmstead so named in the county of Sogn og Fjordane, possibly from a compound of the Old Norse personal name Baldrekr + nes ‘point, headland’.

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

nameMeanings.name: De

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley was born on 1 November 1401, in Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Robert Goushill, was 46 and her mother, Elizabeth FitzAlan, was 35. She married Thomas Stanley in 1427, in Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 11 February 1459, in Knowsley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Burscough, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley est née le 1 novembre 1401, à Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Goushill, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth FitzAlan, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Stanley en 1427, à Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 février 1459, à Knowsley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Burscough, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley am 1. November 1401 in Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Goushill 46 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth FitzAlan 35. Sie hat 1427 in Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England Thomas Stanley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Februar 1459 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Knowsley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Burscough, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley è nata il il 1 novembre 1401 nel Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Goushill, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth FitzAlan, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Stanley nel 1427, nel Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 11 febbraio 1459, nel Knowsley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Burscough, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanleyが1401年11月1日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホーバーインガムで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Goushillは46歳，母Elizabeth FitzAlanは35歳であった。1427年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホーバーインガムでThomas Stanleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1459年2月11日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアノウスリーで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアブルスコウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley(이)가 1401년 11월 1일 영국 노틴그함실르 호버링함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Goushill(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth FitzAlan(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1427년 영국 노틴그함실르 호버링함에서 Thomas Stanley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1459년 2월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 노우슬리에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 버스코우그h에 묻혔다.

pt.1 November 1401–11 February 1459: 1 de novembro de 1401–11 de fevereiro de 1459
pt.FROM 2 JUL 1403 TO 21 JUL 1404: de 2 de julho de 1403 a 21 de julho de 1404
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1401, em Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Goushill, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth FitzAlan, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Stanley em 1427, em Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1459, em Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Burscough, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley родилась 1 ноября 1401 г. в местности ховирингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Goushill было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth FitzAlan, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Stanley в 1427 г. в местности ховирингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 11 февраля 1459 г. в местности ноусли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности бурскоую, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley nació el 1 de noviembre de 1401, en Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Goushill, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Elizabeth FitzAlan, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Thomas Stanley en 1427, en Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 11 de febrero de 1459, en Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Burscough, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
